label: 噪声场
description: 在输入区域的有效格（非零格）上生成一张 [0,1] 标量噪声场（field/标量场，区别于 0/1 掩码 region）：每个有效格 (r,c) 输出 hashNoise(floor(r*scale), floor(c*scale), seed) 得到的连续噪声标量值，region 外的格输出 0。复用与 region_noise_fill 同款的坐标哈希噪声，但不做阈值二值化，直接把噪声值写入网格，得到空间相关的连续场。scale 缩放坐标后再采样，越大空间频率越高（变化越碎）。相同坐标+相同 seed 结果固定，可用作密度/权重/扰动等下游数值场。
description-en: Generates a [0,1] scalar noise field (a field/scalar field, as opposed to a 0/1 mask region) on the valid (non-zero) cells of the input region: each valid cell (r,c) outputs the continuous noise value hashNoise(floor(r*scale), floor(c*scale), seed); cells outside the region output 0. Reuses the same coordinate-hash noise as region_noise_fill but without threshold binarization, writing the raw noise value into the grid to yield a spatially-correlated continuous field. scale rescales coordinates before sampling — larger means higher spatial frequency (busier). Same coordinate + same seed is deterministic; usable as a downstream density/weight/perturbation field.
icon: 深色背景上一张网格，格子按连续明暗呈现平滑的噪声渐变块，体现逐格标量噪声场，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: region
inputs.label: 输入区域
inputs.description: 0/1（或多值）约束区网格；只在非零有效格上采样噪声，无效格输出 0。
inputs.description-en: 0/1 (or multi-valued) constraint region grid; noise is sampled only on non-zero valid cells, invalid cells output 0.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 噪声种子
inputs.description: 噪声场种子，0 使用当前时间。相同坐标 + 相同 seed 结果固定。
inputs.description-en: Noise field seed; 0 uses current timestamp. Same coordinate + same seed is deterministic.

inputs.name: scale
inputs.label: 坐标缩放
inputs.description: 坐标缩放因子，缩放后再喂 hashNoise，影响噪声空间频率。>1 变化更碎，<1 更平缓。默认 1。
inputs.description-en: Coordinate scale factor applied before hashNoise, controlling spatial frequency. >1 is busier, <1 is smoother. Default 1.

outputs.name: field
outputs.label: 噪声场
outputs.description: 与输入同形状的标量场（number[][]）：有效格为 [0,1] 噪声标量值，无效格为 0。注意这是连续标量场而非 0/1 掩码。
outputs.description-en: A scalar field (number[][]) matching the input shape: valid cells hold a [0,1] noise scalar, invalid cells are 0. Note this is a continuous scalar field, not a 0/1 mask.
